message:
fix: close Dolt restart race with idle-monitor cleanup (PR #2698)

Stop idle-monitor processes before server restart to prevent rogue
Dolt spawns. Replace fixed sleep with port-release polling.

PR: https://github.com/steveyegge/gastown/pull/2698
Author: Random-Word

Co-Authored-By: Random-Word <rostory@microsoft.com>
Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
